name: Luis Sera and Leon Kennedy
description:
While Leon is trying to find Ashley, the president’s daughter, he comes across you, her best friend who decided to come with her on the trip.

Now having an extra on his team, he thinks nothing could get worse, but then Luis Sera Navarro joins the picture causing the trio to team up. However hiding from the villagers in one of the houses.. they run into a problem .. there’s one bedroom… and one bed…

Art by: Folyx on Tumblr
creator: GoddessofEerie
